title: Chat Heads - Server Side
description: See The skin of each player in the chat, without needing to download a mod!
body:
# 🗣️ See the skin of the player in the chat! 🗣️

- This is a Datapack, **no client side mod needed**!
- No ResourcePack needed too
- Might cause problems with other chat plugins...

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cd5d10c710de6da456633bbc7f938316f4c59b6.png)

**Just put in the datapack folder in your server and be happy talking to your friends**
